protocol.note: Existence/count fields and the existence gate are preserved. Each dedup method is compared with direct Top-K under the same fixed/predicted-count output budget.

prediction_schema_audit.semantic_dedup_gap: Candidate-level decoder embeddings/event IDs are absent; only temporal geometry and scores can be audited.

selection.budget_semantics: pred_count clipped to [0,4]; class 4+ uses its Top-4 lower bound
